samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse detection module. Detects a pulse when data_in transitions from 0 to 1 to 0 (3 cycles). Outputs data_out = 1 at the end cycle of the pulse and returns to 0 otherwise.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="S0">Initial state.</state>
        <state id="S1">State after detecting first rising edge.</state>
        <state id="S2">State after detecting second falling edge.</state>
        <state id="S3">State after detecting third rising edge.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">Current state of the pulse detection process.</reg>
        <always>
            <if condition="~rst_n">
                <assign state="S0"/>
                <assign data_out="0"/>
            </if>
            <else>
                <case state>
                    S0: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b1">
                            <assign state="S1"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign state="S0"/>
                        </else>
                    </case>
                    S1: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b0">
                            <assign state="S2"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign state="S1"/>
                        </else>
                    </case>
                    S2: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b1">
                            <assign state="S3"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign state="S0"/>
                        </else>
                    </case>
                    S3: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b0">
                            <assign state="S0"/>
                            <assign data_out="1"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign state="S1"/>
                            <assign data_out="0"/>
                        </else>
                    </case>
                </case>
            </else>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
</module>
